_comment: schema-reference-lint escapes (SD-LEO-INFRA-SCHEMA-REFERENCE-LINT-001). files: repo-relative paths whose DB client targets ANOTHER database (e.g. the EHG app project) or whose table names are dynamic/templated. tables: relation names to skip everywhere (e.g. tables that exist only in the EHG app DB but are referenced from cross-DB scripts). Prefer the inline pragma (schema-lint-disable-line) for single intentional lines.
_operator_contract_test_note: SD-LEO-INFRA-OPERATOR-CONTRACT-GATE-001: these unit tests use deliberately-fictional fixture table names (foo_events, venture_signals) to exercise detectCreator/consumer/reaper against synthetic CREATOR diffs — they are not real relations.
_forecast_ledger_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-LEO-FEAT-FORECAST-LEDGER-001): migration database/migrations/20260719_forecast_ledger_STAGED.sql carries the @chairman-gated header (additive table WITH RLS+service-role policy — outside the additive-no-rls delegated-apply scope) and is deliberately not applied pre-chairman. The referencing code is FAIL-SOFT by construction: lib/forecasting/ledger.js + gate-attach.js use tableAbsent() (42P01/PGRST205 -> {inert:true} / empty attach) and lib/agents/venture-ceo/truth-layer.js computeCalibration() returns its empty-shape result when the table is absent — a missing table never crashes a live path. Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_chairman_constraints_proposals_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-LEO-INFRA-STAGE-GROUNDING-INJECTOR-001 FR-3): migration database/migrations/20260716_chairman_constraints_proposals_governed_write_path.sql is deliberately not yet applied (requires-chairman-apply header). The referencing functions in lib/eva/stage-zero/synthesis/chairman-constraints.js (proposeConstraintFromOutcome / ratifyProposedConstraint) are the governed write-path API and are not yet wired into a live kill-gate/retro trigger, so the table's absence cannot crash a live path. Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_door_routing_ledger_note: apply-at-cutover table (SD-LEO-INFRA-TIERED-ORCHESTRATION-FABLE-001): migration 20260705_add_door_routing_ledger.sql applies at the Tuesday DOOR_ROUTING_ENABLED flip; the flag-gated fire-and-forget writer tolerates its absence pre-cutover. Remove from this allowlist after the migration applies.
_venture_operating_burn_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-APEXNICHE-AI-LEO-ORCH-SPRINT-2026-001-E1): migration database/migrations/20260712_venture_operating_burn.sql is deliberately not yet applied to the live DB (per the @chairman-gated header). The fail-soft writer (scripts/operator/feed-venture-operating-burn.mjs) tolerates the table's absence -- every upsert call is wrapped in a per-step try/catch. Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_venture_support_tickets_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-FDBK-FIX-SCOPE-VENTURE-SUPPORT-001): migration database/migrations/20260713_venture_support_tickets.sql is deliberately not yet applied to the live DB (per the @chairman-gated header). lib/support/intake-pipeline.js's persistence call sites must fail loud (escalate, not crash) if the table is absent. Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_loop_registry_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-LEO-INFRA-UNIVERSAL-LOOP-GOVERNANCE-001): migration database/migrations/20260713_loop_registry.sql carries the @chairman-gated header and is deliberately not yet applied. The lib/loop-governance/* writers (genesis backfill, closure-verifier) are FAIL-SOFT — every upsert/update/select is wrapped so it tolerates the table's absence (applied=false/ran=false, never throws). Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_model_capability_reference_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-LEO-INFRA-MODEL-CAPABILITY-EVAL-001): migration database/migrations/20260716_model_capability_reference_STAGED.sql is deliberately not applied pre-ceremony. All three referencing scripts (scripts/eval/migrate-sealed-baselines.mjs, ground-truth-gate.mjs) FAIL SOFT on the missing table (CEREMONY_PENDING exit 2 / blocked exit 2 — verified live). Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_cost_governor_log_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-LEO-INFRA-COST-TOKEN-GOVERNANCE-001): migration database/migrations/20260716_cost_governor_log.sql carries the @chairman-gated header (additive table WITH RLS+policy — outside Adam's additive-no-rls delegated-apply scope, so the prod apply needs the chairman @approved-by guard). The referencing code is FAIL-OPEN: lib/cost/governor-log.js writeGovernorDecision returns {ok:false} on the missing table (never throws) and scripts/cost-governor.mjs logs a warning + continues. Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_sms_relay_staging_and_suspensions_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied tables (SD-LEO-FEAT-SMS-INBOUND-RELAY-001): migration database/migrations/20260717_sms_relay_staging.sql carries the @chairman-gated header (three new RLS-enabled tables — outside the additive-no-rls delegated-apply scope). The referencing code in lib/chairman/sms-bridge.js (checkAndApplyAutoSuspend, drainSmsRelayStaging) is FAIL-SOFT by construction: supabase-js resolves query errors as {data:null,error} rather than throwing, so a missing table degrades to 'not suspended' / 'nothing to drain' rather than crashing the currently-live webhook path. Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_sms_decision_class_whitelist_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-LEO-FEAT-SMS-CHAIRMAN-DECISION-001-A, FR-1): migration database/migrations/20260717_sms_decision_class_whitelist_STAGED.sql is the STAGED chairman-gated whitelist (RLS + chairman-only SELECT + REVOKE writes from service_role) and is deliberately not applied pre-ceremony. The referencing code lib/chairman/sms-decision-whitelist.js (isWhitelistedDecisionClass) is FAIL-CLOSED by construction: a missing table resolves to {error}/{data:null} and the helper returns false, so every decision routes to authenticated console until the chairman applies+populates the table (the intended pilot posture) — never crashes the live send path. Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_sms_approved_spend_ledger_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-LEO-FEAT-SMS-CHAIRMAN-DECISION-001-B, FR-2): migration database/migrations/20260717_sms_spend_envelope_STAGED.sql is the STAGED chairman-gated spend ledger (RLS-at-create: ENABLE RLS + service-role FOR ALL write policy + chairman-only SELECT, all in the same file) plus the atomic SECURITY DEFINER debit_sms_daily_spend RPC and the new chairman_decisions gating columns (amount_usd/undo_deadline/undone_at/consumed_at). Deliberately not applied pre-ceremony. The ledger is written ONLY via the RPC (no .from() in code), and the referencing seam lib/chairman/sms-bridge.js (consumeSmsReply) + lib/chairman/sms-spend-caps.js (debitSmsDailySpend) are FAIL-CLOSED by construction: a missing table/RPC/column resolves to {error}/{data:null} and the seam returns non-actionable (routes to console), never approving a spend. The staged chairman_decisions columns carry inline schema-lint-disable-line pragmas. Remove from this allowlist (and drop the pragmas) and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_sms_outbound_obligations_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-LEO-INFRA-SMS-CHANNEL-HARDENING-001-B, FR-1): migration database/migrations/20260718_sms_outbound_obligations_STAGED.sql is the STAGED chairman-gated owed-state substrate (RLS-at-create: ENABLE RLS + service_role FOR ALL policy in the same file) and is deliberately not applied pre-ceremony. The referencing code (lib/chairman/sms-bridge.js enqueueChairmanSms/sendChairmanSmsQuestion, lib/chairman/sms-outbound-worker.js reconcileOutboundSms, api/webhooks/twilio-sms.js handleTwilioStatusCallback) is FAIL-SOFT by construction: a real-row liveness probe resolves the missing table to {data:null,error} and every path degrades to a no-op (enqueue falls back to the pre-existing inline send; the worker finds nothing; the callback skips the owed-row update), never crashing the live send/reply path. Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
_chairman_switchon_policy_note: chairman-gated, staged-not-applied table (SD-LEO-INFRA-INTELLIGENT-SWITCH-AUTOMATION-001-A, FR-2): migration database/migrations/20260718_chairman_switchon_policy_STAGED.sql is deliberately not yet applied (requires-chairman-apply header + REVOKE-hardened ratchet). The referencing function lib/switch-automation/prechecks/audit-stamp.js computePolicyVersion() is FAIL-SOFT by construction: a query error is caught and returns the sentinel string 'policy-table-not-live' (verified by its own unit test), never throws. Remove from this allowlist and re-run npm run schema:snapshot:lint after a chairman applies the migration.
